title: PureCrystal
description: A clean and competitive Crystal PvP resource pack designed to improve visibility, reduce distractions, and deliver a smooth combat experience.
body:
CPvP Pack is a modern and performance-focused resource pack created specifically for Crystal PvP gameplay. Designed with competitive players in mind, the pack enhances combat clarity through optimized textures, clean GUI elements, and reduced visual clutter, helping players react faster and maintain better focus during intense fights.

Featuring improvements such as low fire effects, clearer crystals, simplified particles, and a smooth visual style, CPvP Pack delivers a balanced combination of functionality and aesthetics. Every element is carefully refined to create a cleaner and more responsive PvP experience without straying too far from Minecraft’s original style.

Perfect for practice servers, competitive Crystal PvP, and fast-paced combat scenarios, CPvP Pack provides a sharp and modern feel that enhances both gameplay performance and visual quality. ⚔️🔥
